sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>

# Check initial state from history
if len(history) > 0:
    init_seg = history[0].frame.segmentation
    for n in init_seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'S':
            print(f"Initial blue square: boundary={n['boundary']}")
else:
    print("No history available")

# Also check transitions to see initial state
if len(transitions) > 0:
    init_seg = transitions[0].before_frame.segmentation
    for n in init_seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'S':
            print(f"Very initial blue square: boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
